productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Canon Dialect Blue Yellow Shoe
description: Make your runs easier and lighter with these Canon trainers from adidas. With its LiteStrike features, your running is guaranteed to be fast and comfortable.UpperMesh uppers with synthetic overlays for lightweight durability and breathabilityCushioned tongue and collar for extra comfortLace-ups for snug FitThree synthetic overlays across the sides signifying brand motto of performance, perseverance and achievementOutsole extended onto the toe box and embedded onto it for better protection of the forefootBrand name embedded on the tongue and embroidered behind collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day step-in comfortLiteStrike technology in the midsole for greater cushioningFull length phylon midsole for lightweight cushioningOutsoleBlown rubber outsole for lightweight motion controlOutsole with traxion system on the forefoot for better grip and tractionFlex grooves for better flexibility of the feetToe guard for longer shoe life and protection to the forefootImpact guidance system to enable smoother heel to toe movement while runningShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
